description:
Three independent systems gate whether a phase/tool can write files, and they contradict each other:

1. `tool_supports_repository_writes()` in model_routing.rs — excludes gemini
2. `cli_capabilities_for_tool()` in runtime_contract.rs — gives gemini `supports_file_editing: true`
3. `is_write_phase` matches in phase_executor.rs — gates by phase name string, not tool

This means gemini is both capable and incapable of file editing depending on which code path checks. Unify into a single source of truth — either a tool capability struct or config-driven phase capabilities that declare write permission.
title: Resolve contradictory write-capability systems (tool vs phase vs capabilities)
